description: MetaBCR deep learning model for antibody-antigen binding affinity prediction. Supports flu, SARS, RSV, HIV antigens. Uses sequence-based neural networks to predict binding scores. Critical for antibody screening and therapeutic candidate prioritization. Provides 1 tool: metabcr.

NCBI IgBLAST service for BCR/TCR V(D)J recombination analysis. Identifies germline V/D/J genes, annotates CDR1-CDR3 and framework regions (FR1-FR4), detects somatic hypermutations, and outputs AIRR-standard format. Provides 2 tools: analyze_vdj_batch, extract_cdr3_from_airr.

NetTCR-2.2 TCR-peptide binding prediction service with 6 tools. Uses 20-model TFLite ensemble (5-fold CV x 4 splits) for prediction. Supports 26 pre-trained peptide-specific models with percentile rank rescaling, plus pan-specific fallback for unseen peptides. Auto-detects input format (native 7-CDR: peptide/A1-A3/B1-B3, or legacy: CDR3a/CDR3b/peptide/TRA/TRB_v_gene). Tools: predict_tcr_binding_fast, predict_tcr_binding_ensemble, predict_tcr_binding_complete, validate_tcr_input, check_peptide_support, list_available_peptides. Reference: Montemurro et al., Nucleic Acids Research, 2024.

T cell analysis service with 6 tools. **KEY TOOL: integrate_tcr_data_complete** - Merges CSV prediction results (from NetTCR, IgBLAST) into RDS Seurat objects by barcode matching. Use this after NetTCR predictions to combine prediction scores with cell metadata. Also provides cell type visualization (tcell_celltype_visualization), marker dotplot (tcell_marker_dotplot_analysis), trajectory analysis (tcell_trajectory_analysis), TCR binding visualization (tcr_binding_visualization), and clonotype expansion analysis (tcr_clonotype_analysis).

Comprehensive immune system analysis service with 7 tools. Provides unified immune cell visualization (immune_celltype_visualization), marker analysis (immune_marker_dotplot_analysis), trajectory analysis (immune_trajectory_analysis), DEG analysis (immune_deg_analysis), CellChat cell-cell communication (immune_cellchat_analysis), cell isolation (immune_isolate_cells), and quick comprehensive analysis pipeline (immune_comprehensive_analysis).

B cell repertoire analysis service with 14 tools. Includes cell type visualization (bcell_celltype_visualization), marker dotplot (bcell_marker_dotplot), binding visualization (bcell_binding_visualization), trajectory analysis with Monocle3 (bcell_trajectory_analysis), SHM rate calculation (bcell_shm_analysis), isotype analysis (bcell_isotype_analysis), clonal expansion (bcell_clonotype_analysis), V(D)J gene usage (bcell_vdj_analysis), repertoire diversity (bcell_diversity_analysis), differential gene expression (bcell_deg_analysis), germinal center dynamics (bcell_gc_analysis), plasma cell prediction (bcell_plasma_prediction), affinity maturation analysis (bcell_maturation_analysis), and CytoTRACE differentiation analysis (bcell_cytotrace_analysis).

MetaBCR model training service for antibody-antigen binding affinity prediction. Supports fine-tuning with new experimental data, training from scratch, and training status monitoring. Tools: metabcr_train (in-process streaming), metabcr_train_subprocess (background process), metabcr_train_with_new_data (fine-tune with new data), metabcr_check_training_status. Use this service when you need to retrain or fine-tune MetaBCR models with your own data.
